Compliance.description: ICASA licensed, recent DFA approval; past consumer fine but no major 2025/26 issues.

Product Value.description: Competitive data-heavy plans, SIM-only flexibility; recent ~5% hikes.

Innovation.description: Google Cloud AI partnership, SA first 5G VoNR, VodaPay super app, 5G expansion.

Customer Support.description: TOBi chat/phone/stores available but frequent complaints on resolution times/expertise.

Accessibility & Security.description: POPIA/GDPR aligned, zero privacy fines in 2025, disability support (sign language, bundles), proactive PIAs.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: SIM-only from R129/mo (15GB) to R399/mo (400GB); prepaid R99 (10GB anytime +10GB night owl)

socialSentiment.summary: Overwhelmingly negative on HelloPeter (billing/service); apps praised for convenience but buggy.
